title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Sasken Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Sasken Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sasken Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sasken Technologies:
Sasken Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies!
